style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="幽灵删除事故：从一次"无害"重构到线上超卖" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="580" x="260" y="10" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="120" x="460" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="C4" parent="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="C5" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="数据/超卖" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="120" x="860" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="LIFE1" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;dashed=1;html=1;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;" value=""> relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M3" edge="1" parent="1" source="C2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#16a34a;fontColor=#16a34a;fontSize=11;" target="C3" value="3. 编译绿(语法契约全过)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M4" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#16a34a;fontColor=#16a34a;fontSize=11;" value="4. 门禁放行(只验语法)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="520" y="260" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="520" y="300" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M5" edge="1" parent="1" source="C3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#475569;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" target="C4" value="5. 合入主分支 → 静默潜伏数天"> <mxGeometry value="6. 大促放量，并发抢同一订单"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="720" y="380" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="720" y="420" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M7" edge="1" parent="1" source="C4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=block;strokeColor=#dc2626;strokeWidth=2;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=11;" target="C5" value="7. 守卫没了 → 超卖/串号"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ROOTCAUSE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="根因：编译器只校验语法契约，看不见行为依赖；门禁停在 compile，没跑到 verify" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="860" x="120" y="510" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
